title: यीशु तेरा नाम
author: Traditional

scriptureRefs.note: That at the name of Jesus every knee should bow
Neither is there salvation in any other

story: One of the most widely sung Hindi Christian bhajans across North India. This traditional worship hymn exalts the name of Jesus as the highest name, and has been a staple of Hindi-speaking congregations for generations. Its simple, repetitive melody makes it easy for large gatherings to sing together.

lines: यीशु तेरा नाम सबसे ऊँचा है
यीशु तेरा नाम सबसे प्यारा है
हर एक घुटना तेरे आगे झुकेगा
यीशु तेरा नाम सबसे ऊँचा है
linesRomanized: Yeshu tera naam sabse ooncha hai
Yeshu tera naam sabse pyaara hai
Har ek ghutna tere aage jhukegaa
Yeshu tera naam sabse ooncha hai
